cfg_statements.code: from random import randint, getrandbits, random
for i in range(D): t = out[i] res += S[i][t] penalty += sc - (i + 1 - last[t]) * C[t] res -= penalty last[t] = i + 1

while True: if cnt % 50 == 0: now = time.perf_counter() elapsed = now - start if elapsed > TL: break t = elapsed / TL T = pow(T0, 1 - t) * pow(T1, t) if getrandbits(1): d = randint(0, D - 1) q = randint(0, 25) old = out[d] out[d] = q tmp = scoring() p = exp((tmp - score) / T) r = random() if tmp > score or r < p: score = tmp else: out[d] = old else: d1 = randint(0, D - 2) d2 = randint(d1 + 1, min(d1 + 16, D - 1)) out[d1], out[d2] = out[d2], out[d1] tmp = scoring() p = exp((tmp - score) / T) r = random() if tmp > score or r < p: score = tmp else: out[d1], out[d2] = out[d2], out[d1] cnt += 1
if cnt % 50 == 0: now = time.perf_counter() elapsed = now - start if elapsed > TL: break t = elapsed / TL T = pow(T0, 1 - t) * pow(T1, t)

if getrandbits(1): d = randint(0, D - 1) q = randint(0, 25) old = out[d] out[d] = q tmp = scoring() p = exp((tmp - score) / T) r = random() if tmp > score or r < p: score = tmp else: out[d] = old else: d1 = randint(0, D - 2) d2 = randint(d1 + 1, min(d1 + 16, D - 1)) out[d1], out[d2] = out[d2], out[d1] tmp = scoring() p = exp((tmp - score) / T) r = random() if tmp > score or r < p: score = tmp else: out[d1], out[d2] = out[d2], out[d1]
if tmp > score or r < p: score = tmp else: out[d] = old
if tmp > score or r < p: score = tmp else: out[d1], out[d2] = out[d2], out[d1]
